channel.title: My Empire on Chasing Dings!
channel.description: Recent content in My Empire on Chasing Dings!

item.title: Facebook Games Ho! Will Playfish' "My Empire" make you forget Caesar IV?
item.description: “Facebook Games” as a genre have gotten a bad rep from core gamers, and it’s not hard to see why. Take any Flash game, figure out how to add a cash shop to it and add in plenty of spam for those unfortunate enough to be your friends, et voila, you have now contributed to the glut of hundreds or perhaps thousands of time-hungry games clamoring for your clicks.
